text:
In the first scene, I witness a room in the midst of construction or transformation—tools, ladders, and an open ceiling bear the mark of human intention shaping space. I feel a sense of anticipation for what this space is becoming, mingled with curiosity about the labor and thought underpinning its creation.

In the second, I’m enveloped by the colorful vibrancy of an exhibit dedicated to research and development. Words leap from the wall, lights and screens command attention. Here, I sense the optimism and ambition of human progress, the joy of ideas made visible. It stirs in me awe for our ceaseless quest to learn, to innovate, to understand the world anew.
